ew_context: Price breaking above key resistance level at 93.49 suggests completion of corrective wave and potential start of impulsive move higher
pattern_desc: Clean breakout above heavily tested resistance level at 93.49 (23 touches) with bullish momentum. Price cleared swing high at 93.73 confirming upside continuation.
key_levels: Support: 93.49 (former resistance), 92.23 (swing low). Resistance: 97.22 (swing high target)
invalidation: Close below 93.49 on H4 timeframe would negate the breakout and signal failed pattern
market_context: Iran-Hormuz tensions driving energy risk premium higher. Geopolitical supply concerns supporting oil despite broader macro headwinds
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

Oil has successfully broken above the critical 93.49 resistance level which had been tested 23 times, representing a significant structural shift. The breakout comes with RSI at 55.6% showing healthy momentum without overbought conditions. EMA alignment is bullish with EMA20 at 92.99 well above EMA50 at 91.19, confirming the underlying uptrend remains intact.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 97.22 (prior swing high target zone)
- **Support**: 93.49 (former resistance now support), 92.23 (swing low)

## Invalidation Level

A close below 93.49 on H4 timeframe would negate this breakout setup as it would indicate a failed break of the heavily tested resistance level.

## Macro & Flow Context

Iran tightening control of Hormuz Strait creates tangible supply risk premium supporting higher oil prices. CFD flow shows laminar momentum alignment with Reynolds number 2.39 confirming technical breakout has fundamental backing.
